## What does this PR do?

A brief description of the change.

## Why?

The motivation behind this change (bug fix, new feature, refactoring, etc.).

## How to Test

1. Step-by-step instructions to verify the change
2. Include which platform(s) to test on

## Platform

- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] PHP only (no native changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer check` passes (lint, refactor, analyse, test)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for PHP changes
- [ ] Native changes tested on a real device
- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
